title_en: San Diego Comic-Con 2026 Is Here: How to Watch IGN’s Live Coverage Featuring Marvel’s Hall H, Blade Runner 2099, Lanterns, and Huge Reveals All Week Long
summary_en: Get the complete San Diego Comic-Con 2026 schedule, including IGN live stream times, panel breakdowns for Marvel Hall H, Lanterns, LOTR, and how to watch online.
body_en:
San Diego Comic-Con returns this week and IGN will be on the ground to bring you all the biggest news, reveals, exclusive and celebrity interviews from the world’s biggest pop culture convention. We’ll have live coverage at the biggest new movies, shows, and games along with inside looks at comics, collectibles, and more. San Diego Comic-Con 2026 will feature huge reveals from some of the most talked-about properties in Hollywood and beyond. Following last year’s edition (which featured reveals from Project Hail Mary, Peacemaker, Predator: Badlands, and Avatar: The Last Airbender) 2026 is set to be another banner year at Comic-Con.
Starting today, be sure to stay tuned across IGN platforms for exclusive sneak peeks and first-looks at some of the biggest reveals from this year’s show.
Then, on Friday, July 24 and Saturday, July 25 IGN will be streaming live from San Diego with A-list interviews, exclusive reveals, and live coverage of SDCC’s biggest panels and announcements. Our broadcast runs from 3pm PT / 6pm ET to 7pm PT / 10pm ET each day and streams across IGN platforms.
Also:
We’ll also be featuring inside looks and huge properties from the teams behind The Last Ronin, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Comics, and more.
Throughout the week, IGN will be inside the biggest panels at San Diego Comic-Con, bringing you live reports and inside looks at all the big reveals including:
Plus be sure to check out IGN.com and IGN’s YouTube channel for even more from the teams behind Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Comics, The Last Ronin,
But that’s not all. In addition to our live shows, we’ll be bringing you in-depth panel coverage, breaking news, first looks, and inside info from San Diego Comic-Con throughout the week across IGN.com, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, Facebook, and more!
And if that’s not enough, IGN is teaming up with Prime Video for a huge San Diego Comic-Con party. Taking place on Friday, July 24 at the iconic San Diego Hard Rock Hotel, the “IGN@SDCC 2026 Party - Presented by Prime Video” will include photo ops, live DJ, and themed drinks. This is an exclusive event for invited industry guests as well as a select number of ticket holders.
San Diego Comic-Con 2026 is shaping up to be the biggest yet and IGN is bringing you all the biggest news, celebrities, exclusive reveals, and more. So be sure to stick with IGN all throughout the week so you don’t miss a moment.
Illustrations by Amanda Flagg.
